titleStmt.title: SII 9.557: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 557. (A.R. No. 9 of 1904.) ON THE NORTH BASE OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE OF THE VITTHALESVARA TEMPLE AT HAMPI, HOSPET TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1455, Vijaya, Mārgaśira, śu. 11, Guruvāra, corresponding to A.D. 1533 December 11, Thursday, in the reign of Achyutadēvarāya-Mahārāya. It records the Sanskrit verse sung by Tirumalamma, about the gift of suvarṇa-mēru made by the king in the presence of the god Viṭṭhalēśvara. It is interesting to note that Tirumalamma was a Sanskrit poetess.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīra Acyutadēvarāyamahārāyaru vijeyasaṁvatsarada mārgaśīrṣa śu 11 guruvāradali tuṁgabhadrātīradali śrīviṭhalēśvarana saṁnidhiyali māḍida suvarṇamērudānakke vōduva tirumalaṁmanavaru hēḷida ślōkavidu .
bāṇaprāṇapayōdhiśītakarasaṁkhyātē śakavatsarē vikhyātē vijayē ca māsi sahasi svacchē ca pakṣē gurōḥ vārē viṣṇudinē śubhēparisarē śrīviṭhalādhīśituḥ dhīraḥ kāṁcanamērudānamakarōdvīrōcyutakṣmāpatiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 9.557 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
